children.name: No matter what threats you face online, ReputationDefender can help. We have solutions to protect your privacy, correct misleading search results, and more.

children.name: A former disgruntled business partner with an axe to grind makes up scandalous allegations against a successful executive. Harmful and serialised content begins to appear in the executive’s search results, which attracts attention from bloggers and the media. As a result, potential business partners cease negotiations and prominent clients opt of partnerships. In addition, threats are made anonymously against the executive’s family.
children.characters: A former disgruntled business partner with an axe to grind makes up scandalous allegations against a successful executive. Harmful and serialised content begins to appear in the executive’s search results, which attracts attention from bloggers and the media. As a result, potential business partners cease negotiations and prominent clients opt of partnerships. In addition, threats are made anonymously against the executive’s family.

children.name: Past mistakes made by a previous executive team continue to dominate the search results, steering potential business partners, investors and key stake holders to incorrect, outdated materials. In the news media, old issues continue to dominate, overshadowing recent successes. Hostile bloggers further highlight the negative.

children.name: A prominent financier and philanthropist contacted us following a robbery in which his passport was stolen. The individual was distressed that the thief had been able to track him down and break into his car. He was also worried that his search results painted a one-sided picture.
